message:
fix(freeze): relooper base_popped_count reset, regexp constructor, string encoding, debug cleanup

Bug fixes:
- Reset base_popped_count when base_stack_depth incremented in get_field2 and
  get_var_ref_check handlers — fixes cascading wrong stack offsets (sp-2, sp-3, sp-4
  instead of sp-1) causing TypeError crash in TSC createProgram destructuring
- Fix module_parser string encoding to handle (len << 1 | is_wide) format from QuickJS
- Fix regexp opcode to use js_frozen_regexp_constructor with compiled bytecode
  instead of new RegExp(pattern, flags) which misinterpreted the bytecode operand
- Pin _locals_jsv array to stack to prevent optimizer from splitting/reusing slots
- Widen array.push lookahead to stop at all call-like opcodes and get_field2
- Thin codegen: return error.UnsupportedOpcode instead of @trap() for graceful fallback

Debug cleanup (recovered ~1.9s regression from 10.7s to ~8.8s):
- Remove set_value() watchpoint, debug_record_call(), [DEBUG-*] fprintf from QuickJS
- Remove edgebox_call_profile_enabled() hot-path extern call from JS_CallInternal
- Remove recordDispatch() name copying from frozen dispatch lookup
- Remove dispatch trace ring buffer, counters, stats, and frozen_debug_check_local
- Move execinfo.h include inside #ifdef FROZEN_DEBUG_REFCOUNT guard
